channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Engine Officers
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Urgent vacancies exist for experienced maritime professionals on a Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge fleet. Positions include Second Engineer, Third Engineer, ETO, Assistant ETO/Electrician, and Able Seaman. Candidates must hold relevant Certificates of Competency and possess specified years of experience on similar vessels. Contract durations vary, with unpaid off-rotations. Immediate joining is available for qualified officers and engineers, subject to ARAMCO approval. Salary is negotiable. All certificates must be valid for at least 12 months.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Second Engineer Job - Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge at Aavishka

item.description:
Location: Vietnam
Description:

A Chief Engineer is required for an Oil/Chemical Tanker (15,000 DWT) joining in Vietnam by the end of July. Candidates must have a minimum of 3 years of sailing experience and hold accepted COCs (Indian, UK, Panama, Singapore). The position offers a salary range of 10,000-12,500. Applicants should be ready to join within 5-7 days.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Job - Oil/Chemical Tanker at CASCADE MARITIME PVT LTD

item.description:
Location: Cyprus
Description:

Hiring is open for experienced Chief Engineers, Second Engineers, and Electro-Technical Officers (ETOs) to join an Oil/Chemical Tanker. Immediate joining is available in Cyprus. Contract durations are 4 ± 1 months for Chief Engineers and 6 ± 1 months for Second Engineers and ETOs. Salaries offered are up to 12,500 USD, 10,000 USD, and 5,000 USD per month, respectively. Applicants require a Georgian or Indian COC and relevant experience on similar vessel types, with good English proficiency.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer, 2nd Engineer, ETO Jobs on Oil/Chemical Tanker at DESE Crew Management
[Gold Job] Second Engineer for 4 Point Mooring DSV Vessel (NON-DP) at
[Gold Job] ETO for DP2 PSV vessel at

item.description:
Location: ARAMCO
Description:

A Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge requires experienced Second Engineers. Candidates must hold a Chief Engineer Unlimited or Second Engineer Unlimited III/2 Certificate of Competency and possess a minimum of 24 months of experience in rank on SPJUB. The rotation is 75-90 days on, followed by 60 days off (unpaid). Salary is negotiable. Immediate joining is subject to ARAMCO Provisional Approval.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Second Engineer Job - Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge at Aavishka

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A maritime company is seeking experienced 2nd Engineers with MAK engine experience. Promotion candidates are welcome. Opportunities are also available for 3rd Engineers requiring Chemical DCE. These positions are open to Indian seafarers only and will be on container vessels.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Job on Container Vessel at TNC Human Resource Advisory

item.description:
Location: KSA
Description:

Qualified Chief Engineers, Second Engineers, Third Engineers, ETOs, and Crane Operators are sought for a SPJUB vessel operating on an Aramco project. Minimum experience requirements vary by position, with specific COC and certificate requirements. Joining is upon provisional approval and KSA visa issuance. Salary is to be discussed. Applicants must have valid documents for 12 months and not hold a valid Saudi Iqama visa.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engine Officers Crane Operator Vacancy on SPJUB Vessel at Aavishka

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge is seeking an experienced Second Engineer with a Chief Engineer Unlimited or Second Engineer Unlimited III/2 CoC. Minimum 24 months of experience as Second Engineer on SPJUB is required. The rotation is 75-90 days on and 60 days off. Immediate joining is available, subject to ARAMCO PAL. All relevant certificates must be valid for at least 12 months.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Second Engineer Job - Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge at Aavishka

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Engineer is sought for a container vessel. The contract duration is 4 months, with potential +/- 1 month variation. Embarkation is scheduled for August 1, 2026. The vessel has a DWT of 52788 and is powered by a SULZER 7RT-flex96C-B engine.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Job on Container Vessel at Columbia Shipmanagement Ukraine Dry Fleet
